ballot_measures.title: Question 6
ballot_measures.description: Provide for a state constitutional right to abortion before fetal viability. This citizen-initiated measure is on the Nevada 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.title: Question 7
ballot_measures.description: Require voters to present photo identification when voting in person or to provide the last four digits of their driver’s license or Social Security number when voting by mail. This citizen-initiated measure is on the Nevada 2026 ballot.
